## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of Scrunch AI platform capabilities and strategies for leveraging AI visibility for GrowthX clients.](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Scrunch AI offers powerful AI visibility tracking, with custom setup options for GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Key focus areas: optimizing for AI (not just Google), tracking AI presence, and leveraging AI traffic data](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Actionable strategies: target high-impact prompts, optimize metadata, pursue strategic backlinks/mentions](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [New features coming soon, including granular AI hit tracking (retrieval, indexing, training)](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### AI Optimization Landscape

  - [Websites now need optimization for humans, Google, AND AI/LLMs - each with distinct criteria](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [AI adoption accelerating rapidly; ChatGPT = fastest adopted platform in Internet history](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Human website traffic likely to decrease; critical to measure and optimize for AI traffic](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Scrunch AI Platform Overview

  - [Two setup options:](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
    1.  Quick 10-min brand creation (URL input → auto-generated context)
    2.  White-glove service for GrowthX (2-day turnaround, custom prompts/tags/personas)
  - [Auto-generated brand context: description, personas, competitors, key topics (all editable)](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Bulk prompt addition with platform selection](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Analysis features: filter by branded/non-branded, tags, personas](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)

### Leveraging Scrunch for Client Insights

  - [Competitive presence analysis across prompted queries](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Detailed prompt-level breakdowns (e.g., Augment case study)](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Source citation tracking to identify high-value targets for backlinks/mentions](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Metadata optimization focus: URL slug, title, description (be highly descriptive for LLMs)](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

### Upcoming Features

  - [New tab for granular AI hit tracking](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

  - [Critical for demonstrating AI visibility and impact to clients](https://fathom.video/share/5L1VCJXnxqGRum7zhonyYReZnGxLSZj8?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
